message:
test(bd-1u39): cover summarize/translate/sql prompts, builder version and derives

Add 6 tests to testing/fixtures/prompts.rs: summarize_prompt,
translate_prompt, sql_prompt field verification, PromptBuilder
version setter, Debug/Clone, and exact all_sample_prompts count
(8 → 14 tests).
